titleStmt.title: SII 22.553: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 553. (A.R. No. 553 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, LAḌḌIGAM On the south east, north and west walls of the shrine of the Nīlakaṇṭēśvara temple Rājakēsarivarman Chakravartin Kulōttuṅga Chōḷadēva I16th year (A.D. 1085)

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Pugaḻśūḻnda-puṇari, etc. It states that while the king was seated in the Chitra-maṇḍapa (art gallery ?) of his palace at Ayirattaḷi alias Āhavamallakulakālapuram he issued orders granting as tax-free dēvadāṉa, the village of Mādamaṅgalam in Puli-nāḍu, a division of Raṭṭapāḍikoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, for the requirements of worship to the deity in the temple of Iruṅgōḷīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva at Kōyāṟṟūr alias Uṭṭamaśōḻapuram. which is stated to have been built by Aḍavalāṉ Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻan alias Iruṅgōḷaṉ. The village granted was renamed Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻanallūr with its former tenants replaced by others. The deed is signed by a large number of the king's officers headed by the Tirumandiravōlai Rāmaṉ Lakkuvaṇaṉ alias Rājarāja-Pallavaraiyaṉ of Kappalūr and the Tirumandiravōlaināyakam Toṇḍaimāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyiṟ poṉnemiyaḷavun taṉnemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai yiḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāriayirnaṉaik kontaḷa varaicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvalikāṭṭi porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭit teṉṟicait temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉniyāṭai naṉnilappāvai tanimaiyun tavirvantu punitanaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi yiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat toṉnilaventar
cūṭa muṉṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yirunila vaḷarka meṅkaṇun taṉātu tirunila veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tanimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcorikaḷuṟumuṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya piṟkulappiṟaipol niṟpiḻai yeṉnuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kaivillatu koṭā vikkalaṉ kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṅ veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷuṟu viṭṭa taṉmāṉamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutukuneḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭa
lkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait taṉ nāḷukantāṉaiyum paṉnāḷiṭṭam pala pala mutuku payantetir māṟi Aiyap peruntiruvum pariyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyum vāḷāroṇ(ṇ)kaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu koṭuttu veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇaveṉṟum paraṇi yiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkoḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittāṅkaḷum tantivāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatu polat taṉ peruñ ceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta porkaḷat tañciventeḷit taraṇeṉap pukkāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭṭi
ppaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyuṅ koṟṟa veñcura meṟṟik koṟṟa vijaiyastambhan ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttiṉ calāpamum muttamiṭpotiyalum mattavaṉ karipaṭu maiyyaṟac cayyamuṅ kaṉniyuṅ kaiykkoṇṭaruḷi muṉ nāṭṭalaik kāṭṭiya kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tanivicumpeṟa māveṟiya taruvaru tanittalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟun (neṟitoṟu) nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟalkoḷ ciṅkācaṉan tirittaruḷap poṅkeḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkalum pol viramuntiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī
kolottuṅka coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 6- Āvatu Āyirattaḷiyāṉa Āhavamalla kulakālapurattuk koyiliṉuḷḷāl cittiramaṇṭapattuc coṭṭaiyil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattup pulināṭṭu mātamaṅkalam Iṟuttapaṭiyil Eṟinavāṇṭu celavāna māṭai Eṇpattiraṇṭey kāley Araikkālum Immāṭaiyāl vanta Ūrkkaḻaiñcum kumarakkaccānamum vaṇṇārappāṟaiyum minpāṭṭamum taṭṭārppāṭṭamu muḷḷiṭṭa kiḻiṟaippāṭṭamum māṭaikkūli tacavantamum kālaḷavu kūliyum ciṟucuṅkamum Āṭṭuppāṭṭamum velikkācu muḷḷiṭṭa Antarāyamuṭpaṭa Āṭavalāṉ kaṅkaikoṇ
ṭa coḻanāna Iruṅkoḷaṉ Iṉ nāṭṭuk koyāṟṟūrāṉa Uttamacoḻapurattu Eṭuppitta Iruṅkoḷiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum niṉṟiṟaiyāy Iṟuppatāka Ivvūr muṉ kāṇiyuṭaiyāraiyu munpiyaruntavirntu kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻa nallūreṉṉumpiyarāl yāṇṭu patināṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal devatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka variyiliṭa tiruvāy moḻintaruḷināreṉṟu tirumantiravolai rājarājappāṇṭi nāṭṭu rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muttūṟṟuk kūṟṟattuk kappalūruṭaiyān Irāmaṉ Ilakkuvaṇanāṉa rājarājap pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttinālum tirumantraolai nā
yakam toṇṭaimāṉum Oppiṭṭup pukunta keḻvippaṭiye variyiliṭṭuk koḷkaveṉṟu viṭaiyil Iḷāṅkuṭaiyār koṅkan kaṅkaikoṇṭārāṉa kāṭuveṭṭikaḷum koṭṭūruṭaiyār Āykoḻuntu kulakkattaṇaiyataraiyarum ciṟṟāmuruṭaiyār perumāḷ kāṟaik kaṟppattārāṉa rājentra coḻak kaḷappāḷarājarum Uṭan kūṭṭattukkiḷiyūruṭaiyā(r)nāna nāṭṭu pukaḻ nārāṉa vaḷḷuvarājarum Ivarkaḷ Evinapaṭiye viṭaiyil nuḷamparājarum rājentra- coḻa brahmātirājarum Uṭankūṭṭattu rājarāja- muṉaiyataraiyarum Atirājentra pallavarāyarum Iruṅkoḷarum Atikāri(kāri)kaḷ taraṇiviccātiramuventaveḷārum viṭaiyil Atikārikaḷ maturāntakamuventaveḷārum kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻamuventave(ve)ḷārum rājamāṇikkamuve
ntaveḷārum rājaviccātiramuventaveḷārum Atirājentṛ muventaveḷārum pañcavan pallavaraiyarum tāṉatuṅka viḻupparaiyarum Iravikulacoḻa viḻupparaiyarum parakecari viḻupparaiyarum mummuṭi coḻaviḻupparayarum rājāti rāja muventaveḷārum kuṇatuṅka coḻamuventa veḷārum jayaciṅkakulakālap pallavarayarum Intrasamāṉa muventa veḷārum coḻamāttāṇṭa muventa veḷārum rājentracoḻac cerakoṉārum Atirājamuventa veḷārum vāṉavaṉ pallavarayarum vikkiramaciṅka viḻupparaiyarum virapāṇṭiya muventaveḷārum coḻacikāmaṇi muventaveḷārum coḻaviccātira muventaveḷārum Uttamacoḻa muventa veḷārum Apimāṉamerumuventaveḷārum rājentra muventaveḷārum Uttamapāṇṭiya muventaveḷārum
kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻa muventaveḷārum vāṉavaṉ Uttaramantiriyārum teṉnavaṉcoḻa muventaveḷārum villavaṉ muventaveḷārum rājentracoḻa muventaveḷārum coḻakulanārāyaṇa muventaveḷārum rājentra coḻa Iṭaituṟai nāṭāḻvārum naṭuvirukkuṅ kuravaciri śrī Araṅkanātapaṭṭarum kārampic ceṭṭu śrī mātavapaṭṭarum Eva puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷam kaṇakkeḻutuvikka kaṇkāṇi Iraṭṭakulakāla muventaveḷānum Apimānacoḻa muventaveḷānum kollāpuraṅkoṇṭa coḻa viḻupparayanum pūpāla cūḷāmaṇi muventaveḷānum keraḷāntaka muventaveḷānum Intrasamāna muventaveḷānum coḻakulapati muventaveḷānum coḻapāṇṭiya muventaveḷānum puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷam rājanārāyaṇa muven
taveḷānum Aricayapāṇṭiya muventaveḷānum kuṭikiḻāṉum kumāranārāyaṇa muventaveḷāṉum Apimāṉacuntara muventaveḷānum vaḷavanmāṇikka muventa veḷānum tiyākacuntara muventaveḷānum māḷikai mutalukkup puravuvarināyakam marutaṅkuṭaiyānum vicakkaṇakkup puravuvarināyakam kuvalaiya tivākara muventaveḷāṉum poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyānum varippottaka nāyakam cuntaracoḻanallūruṭaiyāṉum vaḷantarāja viḻupparaiyanum mukaveṭṭi parākkirama cekara muventaveḷānum tiruppeṟūr kiḻavanum nikarili coḻa muventaveḷānum pāllāliyāṭaiyānum Iṇaiyāṉkuṭaiyānum kiḻparaṉūruṭaiyānum maturāntaka viḷānāṭṭu muventaveḷānum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa muventaveḷānum māḷikai mutalukku mukaveṭṭi viracoḻap pallavarāyanum
terippāpparuku kulamāṇikka muventaveḷānum Aṉantaviccātira muventaveḷānum viḷantai Uṭaiyānum Aḻakiya rājaviḻupparaiyanum Īṅkovaiyuṭaiyānum cauntraciṅka nallūruṭaiyānum nāvutān Uttamarājamuventaveḷānum virapāṇṭiya muventaveḷānum Ulakentiya coḻa veḷānum kaṇṭarātitta muventaveḷānum peruntarattār perāl kaṭamai Eḻutum puvirājarāja muventaveḷānum vāṭkai- yuṭaiyānum Otaiyāṭaiyānum kuḷattūruṭaiyānum paṭukaiyuṭaiyānum variyiliṭṭu kaṇṇaviraṅkuṭaiyānum maruttavakkuṭaiyānum paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiyānum varip pottakak kaṇakku mayalūruṭaiyānum vaṅkāramuṭaiyānum paṭṭolai cempaṅkuṭaiyānum Aracūruṭaiyānum koṭiyāla muṭaiyānum Ariyalūruṭaiyānum Etirili coḻap pāccil veḷaānum vicakaṇakkuk kovalanallūr rā
ceriyuṭaiyānum tiripuvanacuntara muventaveḷānum Aruḷāḷaṉ muventaveḷānum vaṉṉamāṇikka muventaveḷānum puttūruṭaiyānum manukula cūḷāmaṇi muventaveḷānum nikarilicoḻa muventaveḷānum vācittāṉ varippottakam cuntaracoḻa nallūruṭaiyānum variyiliṭṭāṉ kiḻpperuntaram pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakaviranāṭṭut tiruveṟumpiyūr Eṟumpiyūruṭaiyān Araiyan tiruvekampaṉnāṉa rājāśriya muventaveḷāṉum paṭṭolai Eḻutināṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kiḻmukaveṭṭi pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Eriyūr nāṭṭut teṅkaṅkuṭaiyān vempaṉ paṭam pakkanāyakanum variyiliṭuvitta puravuvari nāyakam kṣattriyacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuk kayattūruṭaiyāṉ veḷān puttaṉāna Etirilicoḻa muventaveḷānum mukaveṭṭi Iṉṉāṭṭuk kayattūruṭaiyān mañcan tirumulaṭṭāṉamāṉa cempiya rā
ja muventaveḷānum Iruntu yāṇṭu patinālāvatu nāḷ nāṉūṟṟu Aimpattu muṉṟiṉāl variyiliṭṭatu Eḻuttiṭṭa puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi kṣattriyacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuk kayattūruṭaiyāṉ mañcaṉ tirumulaṭṭāṉamāna cempiyarāja muventaveḷān puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam kṣattriya cikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūr nāṭṭuk kayattūruṭaiyān veḷānpattanāṉa Etirilicoḻa muventaveḷān puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam perumpāṇappāṭik karaivaḻi Aṇṭakkuṭi Aṇṭakkuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ Āṭavalāṉāna nirupavirarā(ccā)tira muventaveḷān puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam Āmurkkoṭṭattu Āmurnāṭṭuk kaḷakkāṭṭur Ārakkiḻān jaṉanātaṉ paṭampakka nāyakanāṉa karikāla coḻap pallavaraiyaṉ puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam pāṇṭiya kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Ārkkāṭṭu(r)k kūṟṟattut tukaiyūruṭaiyāṉ veḷā noṭuṅkaṇvanāṉa vaḷavaṉ māṇikka muve
ntaveḷāṉ puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Aṇṭakkuṭaiyāṉ kūttaṉ niṟtantanāṉa Atirācarāja muventaveḷāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 22.553 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
